executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned gates are green; whole-stack certification blocked by external owner-loop residue (marketing stale evidence 4611+ min, blocked-channel-recovery at critical escalation with 861 consecutive repeats).

findings.title: Marketing independent verification stale at 4611+ minutes — still fail-closed
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification artifact is far past the 240-minute max-age threshold and last verdict remains fail.
findings.root_cause: Marketing owner loop is not producing fresh measurable outcome evidence for Codeberg-primary adoption.

findings.title: Blocked-channel-recovery at critical escalation (861 consecutive repeats)
findings.mechanism: Health monitor escalation module detected 861 consecutive timeout repeats; current live topology shows 1 active timeout error.
findings.root_cause: Blocked-channel-recovery job consistently times out at 600s budget; unblocker loop is its owner, not architecture.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology is clean at this snapshot
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection: 26 total, 26 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 running, 0 last-error.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path is fully coherent this run
findings.mechanism: Checker, verifier, and independent verifier all pass after freshness sequence: independent verify → verifier re-check → full-stack confirmation.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Independent verification was stale relative to latest report; re-ran full fresh sequence (independent_verify → verifier → checker) to restore coherence.
Confirmed architecture-owned gates are all green; externalized remaining blockers correctly. No architecture-side self-heal was needed.

independent_verification.summary: Architecture verifier passes, independent verifier confirms ownership boundaries, loop integrity OK, live topology clean. External blockers: marketing stale evidence (fail), blocked-channel-recovery critical escalation (861 repeats).

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.
Blocked-channel-recovery root-cause diagnosis and repair by the unblocker loop.
